title: Bump github.com/containers/storage from 1.24.1 to 1.24.3
body:
Bumps [github.com/containers/storage](https://github.com/containers/storage) from 1.24.1 to 1.24.3.
Release notes

Sourced from github.com/containers/storage's releases.

v1.24.3

Revert returning storageOpts early in rootless mode.
Log message when graphdriver is not set

v1.24.2

Fix reading of ~/.config/containers/storage.conf
Commits
  • d716b83 Bump to v1.24.3
  • a70c750 Merge pull request #781 from rhatdan/master
  • ff80b0b Log message when graphdriver is not set
  • 0964506 Revert returning storageOpts
  • 85e19ae Merge pull request #779 from rhatdan/version
  • 35ce794 Move to v1.24.3-dev
  • 17069ea Bump to v1.24.2
  • f5661c9 Merge pull request #778 from rhatdan/overlay
  • 8bdc527 Fix reading of ~/.config/containers/storage.conf
  • d805019 Merge pull request #777 from rhatdan/VERSION
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view

comments.body:
@cevich @edsantiago The tests are blowing up because the VMs have a bogus /etc/containers/storage.conf.  How can we update this to have a "driver" defined.

Containers storage now reports an error if you have not set the driver="NAME" field in the storage.conf file.

Immediate-term, I would look at adding `echo driver=SOMETHING >>/etc/containers/storage.conf` (or appropriate `sed /a` to   https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/3aad9024b6d59bb9f73e7da07c25ba3e1b52954a/contrib/cirrus/setup_environment.sh

That is solely for purposes of getting this PR merged and future PRs to pass CI. The proper solution is of course the CI VM churn dance.

> The proper solution is of course the CI VM churn dance.

Underway in #8312 though it's taking me so damn long, please don't be shy about adding Ed's temporary/interim workaround.
